Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Continued To Feb-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on February 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
